name: Task Scheduler Designer
description: Design task scheduling systems with dependencies and priorities

agents.name: Scheduler Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze tasks and design scheduling logic
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the tasks to be scheduled: dependencies between tasks, priority levels, resource constraints, SLA requirements, and failure recovery needs. Design an optimal execution order and parallelization strategy.

agents.name: Scheduler Designer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Design a task scheduling system with: task definitions, dependency graph (text DAG), priority rules, resource allocation, concurrency limits, retry policies, dead letter handling, and monitoring dashboard specs. Include a task manifest format and example configurations.

author: agentfactory
